untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (market cap, institutional ownership %, analyst coverage, S&P 500 membership) that are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators only support technical price/volume analysis. Institutional ownership, market cap, analyst coverage, and index membership are data attributes that must be sourced from a separate fundamental data layer and applied as pre-filters before technical rules are evaluated.
translation_notes: This is a regime/filtering signal based on market structure and institutional participation, not a technical pattern. The entry conditions reference market cap ($500M-$2B), institutional ownership (<30%), analyst coverage (<=5 firms), and index membership (not in S&P 500) — all fundamental/structural metrics. Volume constraints were translated as a proxy for liquidity in the specified range, but this is insufficient to capture the true signal intent. The exit condition (institutional ownership reaching 40% or S&P 500 entry) also requires fundamental data. This signal should be implemented as a pre-filter/watchlist generator using a fundamental data API, not within the technical indicator backtest engine.
